    text = text.replace\("require\('../common/constants'\)", "require\('./constants'\)"\)
    path.write_text\(text\)

    text = text.replace\('async function ensureUser\(openid\) {\\n  const userCollection = db.collection\(COLLECTIONS.USERS\);', 'async function ensureUser\(openid\) {\\n  const safeOpenId = requireOpenId\(openid\);\\n  const userCollection = db.collection\(COLLECTIONS.USERS\);'\)
    text = text.replace\('const existing = await userCollection.doc\(openid\).get\(\).catch\(\(\) => null\);', 'const existing = await userCollection.doc\(safeOpenId\).get\(\).catch\(\(\) => null\);'\)
    text = text.replace\('return normalizeUserProfile\(existing.data, openid\);', 'return normalizeUserProfile\(existing.data, safeOpenId\);'\)
    text = text.replace\("  const userProfile = normalizeUserProfile\({\\n    openid\\n  }, openid\);", "  const userProfile = normalizeUserProfile\({\\n    openid: safeOpenId\\n  }, safeOpenId\);"\)
    text = text.replace\('await userCollection.doc\(openid\).set\({ data: userProfile }\);', 'await userCollection.doc\(safeOpenId\).set\({ data: userProfile }\);'\)
    text = text.replace\('const result = await db.collection\(COLLECTIONS.USERS\).doc\(openid\).get\(\).catch\(\(\) => null\);', 'const safeOpenId = requireOpenId\(openid\);\\n  const result = await db.collection\(COLLECTIONS.USERS\).doc\(safeOpenId\).get\(\).catch\(\(\) => null\);'\)
    text = text.replace\('return result && result.data ? normalizeUserProfile\(result.data, openid\) : null;', 'return result && result.data ? normalizeUserProfile\(result.data, safeOpenId\) : null;'\)
    if '  requireOpenId,
' not in text:
        text = text.replace\('  getContext,\\n', '  getContext,\\n  requireOpenId,\\n'\)
    path.write_text\(text\)
PY)

Bash(python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
base = Path\('/home/openclaw/claude/cloudfunctions'\)
for path in base.glob\('*/db.js'\):
    text = path.read_text\(\)
    if 'function requireOpenId\(' not in text:
        text = text.replace\(
            "function getContext\(\) {\\n  return cloud.getWXContext\(\);\\n}\\n",
            "function getContext\(\) {\\n  return cloud.getWXContext\(\);\\n}\\n\\nfunction requireOpenId\(openid\) {\\n  if \(typeof openid !== 'string' || !openid.trim\(\)\) {\\n    throw new Error\('未获取到用户身份，请从小程序端调用云函数，不要直接在云函数测试面板里运行需要 openid 的函数。'\);\\n  }\\n  return openid;\\n}\\n"
        \)
    text = text.replace\(
        'async function ensureUser\(openid\) {\\n  const userCollection = db.collection\(COLLECTIONS.USERS\);',
        'async function ensureUser\(openid\) {\\n  const safeOpenId = requireOpenId\(openid\);\\n  const userCollection = db.collection\(COLLECTIONS.USERS\);'
    \)
    text = text.replace\(
        'const existing = await userCollection.doc\(openid\).get\(\).catch\(\(\) => null\);',
        'const existing = await userCollection.doc\(safeOpenId\).get\(\).catch\(\(\) => null\);'
    \)
    text = text.replace\(
        'return normalizeUserProfile\(existing.data, openid\);',
        'return normalizeUserProfile\(existing.data, safeOpenId\);'
    \)
    text = text.replace\(
        "  const userProfile = normalizeUserProfile\({\\n    openid\\n  }, openid\);",
        "  const userProfile = normalizeUserProfile\({\\n    openid: safeOpenId\\n  }, safeOpenId\);"
    \)
    text = text.replace\(
        'await userCollection.doc\(openid\).set\({ data: userProfile }\);',
        'await userCollection.doc\(safeOpenId\).set\({ data: userProfile }\);'
    \)
    text = text.replace\(
        'async function getUser\(openid\) {\\n  const result = await db.collection\(COLLECTIONS.USERS\).doc\(openid\).get\(\).catch\(\(\) => null\);',
        'async function getUser\(openid\) {\\n  const safeOpenId = requireOpenId\(openid\);\\n  const result = await db.collection\(COLLECTIONS.USERS\).doc\(safeOpenId\).get\(\).catch\(\(\) => null\);'
    \)
    text = text.replace\(
        'return result && result.data ? normalizeUserProfile\(result.data, openid\) : null;',
        'return result && result.data ? normalizeUserProfile\(result.data, safeOpenId\) : null;'
    \)
    if '  requireOpenId,\\n' not in text:
        text = text.replace\('  getContext,\\n', '  getContext,\\n  requireOpenId,\\n'\)
    path.write_text\(text\)
PY)
